proposal.working_title: AI Use Cases Worth Funding in 2026: How to Prioritize by Payback, Not Hype
proposal.one_line_angle: The top of this SERP is sprawling catalogs (Deloitte's industry matrix, Google's 101 use cases, aimultiple's 100+) that list everything and help an operator decide nothing. We win with a prioritization scorecard that ranks AI use cases by payback period, data readiness, and integration risk so a finite AI budget has an obvious first move.
outline_bullets: Why the big AI use case catalogs leave operators stuck
The prioritization scorecard: scoring use cases by payback period, data readiness, and integration risk
Five AI use cases that clear the bar in 2026 and what it takes to ship each one
